moments.title: World Cup 2026 Final
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 culminates on Sunday with the final between European champions Spain and defending world champions Argentina at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Who lifts the trophy on Sunday? Spain vs Argentina in the World Cup 2026 Final – it's set to be epic.

angles.name: Team Focus
angles.copy: Will Messi lead Argentina to back-to-back World Cup titles, or can Spain claim their second? All eyes on New Jersey this Sunday.

angles.name: UK Viewers
angles.copy: Get ready for the biggest game in football! The World Cup 2026 Final kicks off this Sunday. Where will you be watching?

moments.title: The Open Championship at Royal Birkdale
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, professional golf's oldest major, is underway from Thursday to Sunday at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England.

angles.name: Opening Day
angles.copy: It's tee time! The Open Championship returns to Royal Birkdale today. Who are you backing for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Local Buzz
angles.copy: Southport is buzzing as Royal Birkdale hosts The Open. Good luck to all the golfers competing for glory on home turf!

angles.name: Weekend Watch
angles.copy: The final major of the golf season is here! Tune in all weekend for The Open Championship from Royal Birkdale.

moments.title: Beat-Herder Festival Underway
moments.blurb: Beat-Herder Festival, a celebration of diverse music genres with immersive art and vibrant performances, is running from July 16-19 in Lancashire.

angles.name: Live Now
angles.copy: Beat-Herder is ON! Four days of incredible music, art, and good vibes kicking off today. Who's there?

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: From hidden stages to wild art, Beat-Herder promises an unforgettable weekend. Get ready for the sounds of Lancashire!

moments.title: Big Love Festival in Wales
moments.blurb: Big Love Festival, featuring over 130 acts across 6 stages with diverse music, circus, and family-friendly activities, is happening from July 16-19 in the Welsh countryside.

angles.name: Welsh Festival Kicks Off
angles.copy: The Welsh countryside comes alive! Big Love Festival starts today with music, circus acts, and fun for all the family. Are you ready for Big Love?

angles.name: Local Love
angles.copy: Supporting Welsh music and arts this weekend at Big Love Festival. Who are you excited to see?

moments.title: Splendour Festival Nottingham
moments.blurb: Splendour Festival, Nottinghamshire's biggest pop and rock music festival, takes place this weekend (July 18-19) at Wollaton Park.

angles.name: Weekend Festival
angles.copy: Splendour Festival returns to Nottingham this weekend! Get ready for two days of massive pop and rock acts in Wollaton Park.

angles.name: Nottingham's Big One
angles.copy: Nottingham, are you ready for Splendour? The city's biggest festival kicks off Saturday!

moments.title: Latitude Festival Approaches
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival, a diverse music and arts event, will attract 45,000 attendees to Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23-26.

angles.name: Next Week's Big One
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is just around the corner! Henham Park in Suffolk will be buzzing with music, comedy, and arts from next Thursday.

angles.name: Suffolk's Showcase
angles.copy: Who's heading to Latitude next week? Suffolk is about to host one of the UK's most diverse festivals!

moments.title: The Story of China Streams
moments.blurb: The sweeping documentary series 'The Story of China', tracing over 4,000 years of history, begins streaming today in the UK.

angles.name: New Documentary
angles.copy: Dive into 4,000 years of history! 'The Story of China' starts streaming today – perfect for a deep dive into culture.

angles.name: Must-Watch TV
angles.copy: Looking for your next binge? 'The Story of China' is now available to stream in the UK. Epic history awaits!

moments.title: New UK TV This Week
moments.blurb: New series 'The Five Star Weekend' and 'The Chase Around The World' are among the fresh programmes launching on UK TV this week.

angles.name: Fresh TV
angles.copy: What's new on your screens? 'The Five Star Weekend' and 'The Chase Around The World' are just some of the fresh shows hitting UK TV this week.

angles.name: Weekend Viewing
angles.copy: Planning your weekend TV? Don't miss the new series 'The Five Star Weekend' on Sky Atlantic or 'The Chase Around The World' on ITV1.

moments.title: Stewart Copeland (The Police) is 74
moments.blurb: Stewart Copeland, legendary drummer and co-founder of The Police, celebrates his 74th birthday today.

angles.name: Legendary Drummer
angles.copy: Happy 74th birthday to Stewart Copeland, the iconic drummer of The Police! What's your favourite Police track?

angles.name: Music Icon
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to Stewart Copeland today! A true rock legend who brought us some of the greatest drum beats ever.

moments.title: Will Ferrell is 59
moments.blurb: Acclaimed actor and comedian Will Ferrell, known for films like 'Anchorman' and 'Elf', turns 59 today.

angles.name: Comedy King
angles.copy: Happy 59th birthday to the one and only Will Ferrell! What's your all-time favourite Will Ferrell movie?

angles.name: Movie Star
angles.copy: From Ron Burgundy to Buddy the Elf, Will Ferrell has given us so many laughs. Wishing him a very happy birthday!

moments.title: Wizkid is 36
moments.blurb: Nigerian superstar singer and songwriter Wizkid, known for global hits like 'Essence', celebrates his 36th birthday today.

angles.name: Afrobeats Star
angles.copy: Happy 36th birthday to the incredible Wizkid! What's your go-to track from the Afrobeats icon?

angles.name: Global Hitmaker
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy birthday to Wizkid today! Celebrating the artist who's taken African music to the world.

moments.title: Brian May (Queen) is 79
moments.blurb: Brian May, legendary guitarist of Queen and astrophysicist, celebrates his 79th birthday on Sunday.

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: This Sunday, we're celebrating the one and only Brian May's 79th birthday! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy birthday to the legendary Brian May on Sunday! A true icon of rock music.

moments.title: Carlos Santana is 79
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana, known for his distinctive blend of rock, Latin, and blues, turns 79 on Monday.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the incredible Carlos Santana on Monday! His guitar work is truly iconic. What's your favourite Santana track?

angles.name: Music Maestro
angles.copy: Celebrating the timeless talent of Carlos Santana this Monday. Sending birthday wishes to a true music maestro!

moments.title: Yusuf Islam (Cat Stevens) is 78
moments.blurb: Influential singer-songwriter Yusuf Islam, widely known as Cat Stevens, celebrates his 78th birthday on Tuesday.

angles.name: Folk Icon
angles.copy: Happy 78th birthday to the legendary Yusuf Islam, also known as Cat Stevens, on Tuesday! His songs have touched generations. Which is your favourite?

angles.name: Timeless Tunes
angles.copy: Celebrating the enduring artistry of Cat Stevens this Tuesday. Sending birthday wishes to a singer-songwriter who created so many classic tracks.

moments.title: Erling Haaland is 26
moments.blurb: Manchester City and Norway football superstar Erling Haaland celebrates his 26th birthday on Tuesday.

angles.name: Football Star
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 26th birthday to the goal-scoring machine, Erling Haaland, this Tuesday! What an incredible talent.

angles.name: City's Striker
angles.copy: Manchester City fans, get ready to celebrate! Erling Haaland turns 26 on Tuesday. Best wishes to the prolific striker!

moments.title: Selena Gomez is 34
moments.blurb: Global pop superstar and actress Selena Gomez celebrates her 34th birthday on Wednesday.

angles.name: Pop Queen
angles.copy: Happy 34th birthday to the amazing Selena Gomez on Wednesday! What's your favourite song or role from her?

angles.name: Birthday Wishes
angles.copy: Sending big birthday wishes to Selena Gomez this Wednesday! A true multi-talented star.

moments.title: Prince George of Wales is 13
moments.blurb: Prince George of Wales, second in line to the British throne, celebrates his 13th birthday on Wednesday.

angles.name: Royal Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 13th birthday to Prince George of Wales on Wednesday! The future King celebrates his teenage years.

angles.name: Teenage Royal
angles.copy: The Duke and Duchess of Cambridge's eldest son, Prince George, turns 13 this Wednesday. Happy Birthday!

moments.title: UK Summer Holidays in Full Swing
moments.blurb: The summer school holidays are now in full swing across the UK, bringing a peak season for family activities and travel.

angles.name: Holiday Fun
angles.copy: It's official: summer holidays are in full swing! What are your plans for soaking up the sun and making memories?

angles.name: Family Adventures
angles.copy: From staycations to adventures abroad, the summer holidays are here! Share your favourite family-friendly activities with us.
